title: Automata Survivia
description: A handful of the best mods to enhance your modded survival experience without taking away from the game.
body:
A handful of the **best** mods to enhance your modded survival experience <u>without taking away from the game</u>. This pack includes mods like Create, Botania, Hex Casting, Adorn, and so much more. This modpack aims to make Minecraft survival fun and challenging without overwhelming the player with hundreds of miscellaneous mods and quests to fulfill. Play it your way!

## Notice
*This mod is in **alpha**. That means there will be bugs, incompatibilities, and incompleteness in the pack.*
